description: Defines the standard architecture for project scripts.

rules.name: Scripts must use BaseScript
rules.description: Project scripts must extend the shared BaseScript class unless there is a documented reason not to.

rules.name: Scripts must read from config
rules.description: Script behavior must be driven by a config file in the script's config folder.

rules.name: Scripts must write reports to output
rules.description: Scripts must write detailed execution output to their own output folder.

rules.name: Console output must be concise
rules.description: Scripts should print one concise success or failure message to the terminal.

rules.name: Scripts must use shared utilities
rules.description: Scripts should use shared utilities for JSON, paths, config loading, and console output.

rules.name: Scripts should separate configuration, execution, and reporting
rules.description: Script configuration, execution logic, runtime state, and reporting/output generation should remain separated to support reusable script infrastructure and future framework evolution.

rules.name: Scripts must not contain hardcoded output path fragments
rules.description: Scripts must avoid hardcoded output path fragments and should use BaseScript output architecture instead.
